# Mitanshu Goel

> Robotics & AI engineer in Delhi, India. I build teleoperation rigs, robot hands, and the ML behind them — real hardware, numbers as measured.

## Projects
- [Dual-arm VR teleoperation](https://mitanshu.dev/projects/dual-arm-vr-teleop.html): Two Elite CS66 arms follow my hands live via Meta Quest 3, on a real-time C++ control stack.
- [Franka teleop → dataset](https://mitanshu.dev/projects/franka-teleop-dataset.html): Teleoperating a Franka FR3 and recording a 51-episode LeRobot manipulation dataset.
- [Two gloves, three cameras, one clock](https://mitanshu.dev/projects/manus-capture-sync.html): MANUS gloves + 3× RealSense capture synced under 15 ms at p95 (built at Nferent AI).
- [Robot hand plays rock-paper-scissors](https://mitanshu.dev/projects/tesollo-rps.html): A 20-motor Tesollo DG-5F hand reads your gesture and answers.
- [Bodhi, the humanoid that answers](https://mitanshu.dev/projects/bodhi-humanoid.html): A Yanshee humanoid that sees with YOLOv8 and answers by voice.
- [Six legs, eighteen joints](https://mitanshu.dev/projects/hexapod.html): An 18-DoF hexapod with an inverse-kinematics gait engine on ROS 2.
